name: Tier 2 weekly insights panel renders on dashboard
description: Logged-in user sees the Weekly Insights sidebar panel with hours chart and suggestion next to the calendar

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Wait for 5 seconds for the dashboard to load
Verify the dashboard shows a Weekly Insights panel to the right of or below the calendar with a heading Weekly Insights, a hours-per-day bar chart area, and a suggestion text block
